sentences.text: Thank you for calling newman's. Please hold while we connect your call to extension seven zero eight at the tone please say your name then press pound.

Thank you for calling. Please leave a message and your call will be returned as soon as possible. To review the voicemail press one to send a voicemail now press two to discard and rerecord press three for special sending options press four. To review the voicemail press one to send the voicemail now press two to discard and rerecord press three for special sending options press four.
